svg.text: Documents never leave the owner's infrastructure. Only structured, PII-redacted results exit.
Sidecar verifier monitors network, memory, DNS (independent)
Every operation is an immutable, tamper-evident event. RFC 8785 canonical JSON + SHA-256.
Sanitizer Strips hidden text, JS, prompt injection
Enclave Hardware-attested TEE, no host access
Agent Applies PII redaction from contract
Scanner Independent PII check (regex + NER + stats)
Numeric precision clamped to prevent encoding secrets
